headline: West Jakarta flood closes local roads
summary: Banjir di Jakarta Barat memicu genangan permukiman dan menutup sementara beberapa ruas penghubung lokal.
summary_id: Banjir di Jakarta Barat memicu genangan permukiman dan menutup sementara beberapa ruas penghubung lokal.
summary_en: Flooding in West Jakarta caused neighborhood inundation and temporarily closed several local connector roads.
